'''gavojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smacker|smacker]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-v-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smacker|smacker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gavojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gævejeth|gævejeth]] || [[word:gævejej|gævejej]] || [[word:gævejesh|gævejesh]] || [[word:gæveje|gæveje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gavovojoth|gavovojoth]] || [[word:gavovojoj|gavovojoj]] || [[word:gavovojosh|gavovojosh]] || [[word:gavovojo|gavovojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gavojoth|gavojoth]] || [[word:gavojoj|gavojoj]] || [[word:gavojosh|gavojosh]] || [[word:gavojo|gavojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gavofjoth|gavofjoth]] || [[word:gavofjoj|gavofjoj]] || [[word:gavofjosh|gavofjosh]] || [[word:gavofjof|gavofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gavojotho|gavojotho]] || [[word:gavojojo|gavojojo]] || [[word:gavojosho|gavojosho]] || [[word:gavojoko|gavojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gavojoth|gavojoth]] || [[word:gavojoj|gavojoj]] || [[word:gavojosh|gavojosh]] || [[word:gavojo|gavojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gavojothol|gavojothol]] || [[word:gavojojol|gavojojol]] || [[word:gavojoshol|gavojoshol]] || [[word:gavojokol|gavojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gavojothotho|gavojothotho]] || [[word:gavojojojo|gavojojojo]] || [[word:gavojoshosho|gavojoshosho]] || [[word:gavojoko|gavojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gavojothon|gavojothon]] || [[word:gavojojon|gavojojon]] || [[word:gavojoshon|gavojoshon]] || [[word:gavojokon|gavojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gavojothoro|gavojothoro]] || [[word:gavojojoro|gavojojoro]] || [[word:gavojoshoro|gavojoshoro]] || [[word:gavojokoro|gavojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
